reason: kotlin.coroutines.experimental was the preview coroutines API; use kotlinx.coroutines stable API instead
@JvmDefault is deprecated; use compiler flag -Xjvm-default=all for default method generation
kotlin.reflect.jvm.internal is an internal API not meant for public use; use kotlin.reflect public API
newSingleThreadContext creates a dedicated thread; prefer Dispatchers.Default.limitedParallelism(1)
Vector is a legacy Java synchronized collection; in Kotlin use mutableListOf() or ArrayList
Hashtable is a legacy Java synchronized map; in Kotlin use mutableMapOf() or HashMap
Stack extends Vector and is legacy; in Kotlin use ArrayDeque for stack operations
kotlin.js.internal is an internal API; use official Kotlin/JS interop APIs

replacement: Use Delegates.observable with custom setter logic
reason: afterChange callback pattern is discouraged; use Delegates.observable for clearer property delegation
StringBuffer is synchronized and slower; use StringBuilder or Kotlin's buildString { } for string building
Actor and produce builders are marked @ObsoleteCoroutinesApi; prefer Channel or Flow-based patterns

replacement: Cooperative cancellation via coroutines or Thread.interrupt()
reason: Thread.stop() is inherently unsafe; use cooperative cancellation patterns
